arabic: قَالَ الْبَرَاءُ فَدَخَلْتُ مَعَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ، فَإِذَا عَائِشَةُ ابْنَتُهُ مُضْطَجِعَةٌ، قَدْ أَصَابَتْهَا حُمَّى، فَرَأَيْتُ أَبَاهَا فَقَبَّلَ خَدَّهَا، وَقَالَ كَيْفَ أَنْتِ يَا بُنَيَّةُ

english.text:
I then went with Abu Bakr into his 
home (carrying that saddle) and there I saw his daughter `Aisha Lying in a bed because of heavy fever 
and I saw her father Abu Bakr kissing her cheek and saying, "How are you, little daughter?"

chapter.english: Merits of the Helpers in Madinah (Ansaar)
